DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ERIK HERNANDEZ, JASON LOPEZ'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER THAT PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC ONLY. THE ACTION HAS BEEN STAYED AS TO DEFENDANTS KIP MACY AND NICOLE MACY AS A BANKRUPTCY PETITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC IN THE AMOUNT OF $640, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ERIK HERNANDEZ, JASON LOPEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS' RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS' FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC ONLY. THE ACTION HAS BEEN STAYED AS TO DEFENDANTS KIP MACY AND NICOLE MACY AS A BANKRUPTCY PETITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC IN THE AMOUNT OF $640, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS DANA STREET LLC, KIP MACY, AND NICOLE MACY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT (CCP 473 AND 473.5) IS GRANTED BECAUSE MORE LIKELY THAN NOT DEFENDANTS DID NOT RECEIVE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. PROPOSED ANSWER SHOULD BE FILED FORTHWITH. DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFF'S COST IN OBTAINING THE DEFAULT. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE AMOUNT OF COST. IF PARTIES DOES NOT COME TO AN AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A SEPARATE MOTION TO RECOVER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ERIK HERNANDEZ, JASON LOPEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS' RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS' INSPECTION DEMANDS IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC ONLY. THE ACTION HAS BEEN STAYED AS TO DEFENDANTS KIP MACY AND NICOLE MACY AS A BANKRUPTCY PETITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC IN THE AMOUNT OF $640, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT DANA STREET LLC IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION ON A DATE TO BE NOTICED BY PLAINTIFF AND TO BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN MAY 11, 2009. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $640, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiffs Erik Hernandez, Jason Lopez's Motion To Compel Defendant Dana Street LLC's Attendance And Testimony At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Dana Street LLC is ordered to appear for deposition on a date to be noticed by Plaintiff and to be completed no later than May 11, 2009. Defendant's failure to appear for deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
